prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约22793→22729→24519→25041→28597，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约5800名；2025年基准约28597名，较2024年增加3556名，后移幅度明显扩大；本省物理类计划2021年112人→2022年110人→2023年114人→2024年120人→2025年122人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划135人，较2025年扩招约10.7%，扩招幅度为近年最大，对竞争有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第83名（2026年），近年排名在81–85间小幅波动，整体稳定；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风相关事件，但未出现大规模投档异常信号；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常方面，2022年陕西文科曾出现位次骤降，但物理类无显著断档记录；风景园林学A+（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力；但A-及以上学科仅1个，学科覆盖面较窄。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与北林物理类招生专业部分重合；本省2026年考生总数约609,800人，较2025年（606,754人）略有增加，物理类占比约59.8%，估算约364,845人，竞争基数扩大，2025年物理类本科批459分、特殊类型招生控制线499分，近年呈小幅上升趋势；北京林业大学位于北京，对河北考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北省招生占比约2.3%–3.0%（2021–2025年），2025年河北省招生约18人（物理类122人+历史类25人），属中等偏上招生规模省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类大幅扩招约10.7%加剧竞争、本省考生总数略有增加、工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，在2025年基准28597名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约30375名，区间29875–30875名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 22793 → 22729 → 24519 → 25041 → 28597, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5800 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 28597, an increase of 3556 places from 2024, with a significantly expanded backward shift; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 112 in 2021 → 110 in 2022 → 114 in 2023 → 120 in 2024 → 122 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 135, an expansion of about 10.7% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 83rd (2026), with slight fluctuations between 81–85 in recent years, overall stable; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics, but no large-scale abnormal application signals; Douyin popularity ranking 51st (relatively hot), short video exposure moderate, no obvious signs of increased application attention; historical application anomalies: in 2022, Shaanxi liberal arts experienced a sudden drop in ranking, but Physics Category had no significant gaps; Landscape Architecture A+ (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's forestry characteristics, attracting some applicants for related majors; but only 1 discipline at A- or above, with a narrow disciplinary coverage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, partially overlapping with BFU's Physics Category enrollment majors; the province's total number of examinees in 2026 is approximately 609,800, slightly increased from 2025 (606,754), with Physics Category accounting for about 59.8%, estimated at about 364,845, expanding the competition base; in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 459, and the special type enrollment control line was 499, showing a slight upward trend in recent years; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Hebei examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0% (2021–2025), with about 18 students enrolled in Hebei in 2025 (122 in Physics Category + 25 in History Category), making it a medium-to-large enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment by about 10.7% in 2026 intensifying competition, a slight increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 28597; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 30375, with a range of 29875–30875.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 29875–30875, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Statistics, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information Management and Information Systems), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Class, Automation, Electrical Engineering, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Forestry Engineering Class, Landscape Architecture, Gardening, etc.) as safe choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<29875), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors like Computer Class and Electrical Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2907 → 3308 → 3558 → 3483 → 3521, showing an overall backward trend, with narrow fluctuations in the 3480–3560 range in the recent three years; the 2025 baseline is about 3521; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 28 in 2021 → 28 in 2022 → 27 in 2023 → 25 in 2024 → 25 in 2025, showing a slight reduction trend in recent years; the 2026 plan is 24, a decrease of 1 (4% reduction) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 83rd on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), stable in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, but no large-scale enrollment anomalies occurred; Douyin popularity ranking 51st (relatively hot), with moderate exposure; regarding historical enrollment anomalies, the liberal arts ranking in Shaanxi in 2022 experienced a sharp drop (2000 → 10000), but the History Category ranking in Hebei has been stable in recent years, with no similar anomalies; Landscape Architecture is A+, directly related to the majors of Landscape Architecture and Urban and Rural Planning in the History Category enrollment, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of popular liberal arts majors such as Law, Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and wait-and-see, while Teacher Training/Education is also divided and wait-and-see; the estimated number of History Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 244,956 (estimated based on the recent proportion of about 40.2%), a slight increase from 243,714 in 2025; the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch line is 477 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 527 points, showing an upward trend in recent years; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to History Category examinees in Hebei; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province History Category is about 0.4%–0.5% (2021–2025), which is a medium scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuations in historical rankings over the past three years, the slight 4% reduction in the 2026 History Category plan slightly easing competition, a slight increase in the total number of examinees, and the divided popularity of popular liberal arts majors, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 3521; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3451, with a range of 2951–3951.
